title: Tomb Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Tax evasion through a UI that bypasses the protocol's fee system

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls a function to bypass the fee system

red_flags: UI allowing users to evade the tax
publicly known method to bypass the fee system
summary: Tomb Finance faced a situation where users could evade the protocol's fee system through a publicly available UI. This led to the deactivation of the fee system and subsequent loss of funds needed to stabilize the price.
